# Coupon Now

> Coupon Now is a coupon discovery website for finding active promo codes, merchant deals, and affiliate-supported store links.

## Purpose

Coupon Now helps shoppers search merchant offers, compare active discounts, copy coupon codes, and visit stores from clear, crawlable pages.

## Primary routes

- /
- /search
- /merchant/{slug}
- /about
- /contact
- /privacy
- /terms
- /disclosure

## Data policy

Coupon and merchant content is curated for discovery. Expired offers are filtered from active listings, and outbound store links may use affiliate tracking.

## Contact

hello@couponnow.example
